content.en:
Ye Tian chatted with the Tianyang Realm Lord for a while, then said goodbye and left.

Subsequently, he spent some time refining the Yutian Lotus Table, and then tried to comprehend the extradimensional rules, only to find that the effect of this Yutian Lotus Platform was still above the soul pupil, but the side effects were greater.

After refining the Yutian Lotus Terrace, Ye Tian sent a copy body to the Red Dragon Yuan.

As for the Yutian Lotus Terrace, he didn't bring it over, after all, a copy body can enter the Red Dragon Yuan for enlightenment, and other copy bodies can urge the Yutian Lotus Platform to participate in enlightenment, and the effect is almost the same.

......

The Red Dragon Yuan was in the territory of the Six Thousand Numbers, where it was shrouded in the aura of the Tricky Wood Red Dragon, showing a strange black color.

Due to the existence of the Tricky Wood Red Dragon, the Peak Realm Gods naturally did not dare to approach, otherwise they would not be able to withstand the crushing of the breath.

Most of the extra-dimensional realms don't dare to go over "six, eight, seven".

Although it is said that the scales of the Tricky Wood Red Dragon are helpful to comprehend the extradimensional rules, the breath of the third realm is too terrifying, and only the second realm can stay for a few more days, and the first realm will not be able to comprehend for a while, and even fall into it, so that it will not be able to get out.

Therefore, only a few extradimensional realms of the second realm dared to enter the sleeping place of the Tricky Wood Red Dragon.

Of course, over the years, the Tricky Wood Red Dragon has also awakened many times.

And every awakening is accompanied by the fall of some second realm extradimensional realm.

Some timid and frightened powerhouses of the Second Realm Transcendent Realm naturally did not dare to enter the place where the Tricky Wood Red Dragon was sleeping, and there was also a secret, that is, they could not enter the place where the Tricky Wood Red Dragon was sleeping no more than nine times.

As for why, it's because once it exceeds nine times, it will inevitably wake up the Tricky Wood Red Dragon.

I didn't believe it in the second realm before, but it really made the Tricky Wood Red Dragon wake up.

This has been done many times over the years, and it has been the same.

Now, if there is a second realm that dares to go over more than nine times, it will definitely be stopped, after all, such a second realm does not want to live, and the other second realms that are still in the land where the Tricky Wood Red Dragon sleeps still want to live!

"Strange, why does it wake up after entering more than nine times?"

Ye Tian was a little surprised, but no one knew what the reason was.

Of course, there is no limit to the amount of time you can stay at any time, as long as you can withstand the breath of the Tricky Wood Red Dragon, you can stay there all the time.

But who can withstand the erosion of the breath of the third realm for too long?

Soon, Ye Tian came to the outside of the Red Dragon Abyss.

Knock knock knock!!!

Ye Tian's heartbeat beat involuntarily, as if he had encountered an incomparably terrifying existence.

This is after perceiving the breath of the Tricky Wood Red Dragon, the body is uncontrollable and afraid, but this is the initial perception of the impact of the Tricky Wood Red Dragon's breath, and as time passes, it will gradually adapt, and it will not be so afraid.

"It's time to go in!"

Ye Tian took out the corpse of a first-realm extradimensional creature and sacrificed it to the Tricky Wood Red Dragon.

Rumble!!!!!

The corpse of this first-realm extradimensional creature turned into countless blood rays and flowed into the sleeping place of the Tricky Wood Red Dragon, where it was instinctively absorbed by the Tricky Wood Red Dragon.

At this time, Ye Tian found that the aura enchantment of the Tricky Wood Red Dragon was not very defensive against him.

I saw Ye Tian shuttling over alone, and he was not hindered too much.

"Sure enough, all you have to offer is a few things to come in. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

However, the sacrificial thing also needs to have a certain value, and it is best to be flesh and blood in the first realm, or a more precious extradimensional resource, otherwise, it will still not be able to enter.

......

Ye Tian was secretly startled.

The body of this strange wood red dragon is enough to match one-tenth of the extradimensional realm, and that scale is also comparable to the size of countless worlds, and it contains a majestic aura of the origin of extradimensional rules, and these extradimensional rules are constantly evolving, allowing the transcendent realms of the second realm to comprehend.

Ye Tian sensed it, there were more than sixty second realm extra-dimensional realms here, which showed how famous this place was, I am afraid that there will often be second realms coming over.

As for the danger, it is not worth mentioning compared to the harvest.

As long as they come once, the extradimensional rules improve quickly, and they will come back next time. []

After all, I am accustomed to the rapid improvement of the extradimensional rules, and once I go out, the extradimensional rules will not be able to advance for a long time, and I will definitely want to venture in.

can really resist the temptation of the promotion of extradimensional rules, and there are too few extradimensional realms.

Wow!

Ye Tian's body moved, approached the scale of the Tricky Wood Red Dragon, found a position, sat cross-legged, and arranged a formation to prevent other extra-dimensional realms from interfering with him.

Then, his replica body in the outside world began to urge the Yutian Lotus Platform to analyze it, so as to comprehend the extradimensional rules!

Rumble!!!!

With the analysis of Yutian Lotus Platform, Ye Tian became more and more aware of the rules of the extradimensional dimension, and the effect of meditation far exceeded that of usual.

However, the effect of comprehension is still not as good as the core of the fog mother of the extradimensional elf clan.

However, this time Ye Tian's comprehension time will be long enough, plus his talent has transformed, and his cultivation has improved again, so the real improvement speed is far beyond the comprehension of the core of the Fog Mother.

Of course, if he were allowed to participate in the core of the Mother of Mist now, his improvement efficiency would be extremely exaggerated, but unfortunately he didn't have this opportunity.

As time passed, Ye Tian's extradimensional rules soared rapidly.

Seven hundred extradimensional rules!

Eight hundred super-dimensional rules!

Nine hundred silk extradimensional rules!

On this day, Ye Tian's extradimensional rules finally reached the level of a thousand threads.

Moreover, he could still hold on, but his physical body was already affected by the aura of the Tricky Wood Red Dragon.

However, he did not choose to go out, but swallowed a large amount of resources and mobilized some extradimensional rules to protect his physical body, and then continued to stay here to contemplate.

During this period, there were constantly extradimensional realms of the second realm 1.8 leaving, and there were also extradimensional realms of the second realm coming in.

From beginning to end, Ye Tian was silently contemplating and was not affected by other extradimensional realms.

In the blink of an eye, two extradimensional epochs have passed.

At this time, Ye Tiancai was a little unbearable, and the aura of the Tricky Wood Red Dragon was eroding him more and more, as if the longer he stayed, the more he was eroded.

"Gotta leave, or this replica body will fall here, and the fool will know that there is something wrong with me. "

Immediately, Ye Tian left quickly.

"This time the progress is too great, the super-dimensional rule realm has reached more than 1,600 threads, if it is at this rate of progress, maybe I am expected to use these nine opportunities to raise the super-dimensional rule realm to more than 10,000 threads, that is, more than one point realm. "

If he really does this, his strength will increase many times.
